creator: Tor.Egge@idt.ntnu.no
text:
The floppy drive does not stop spinning after booting
	a FreeBSD kernel from a floppy using fbsdboot.exe.

Fix: 

Add a delay in fbsdboot.exe before starting the kernel.

Workaround:
	
	Configure kernel with floppy driver.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Use fbsdboot.exe to boot a kernel from floppy that does not
	contain a floppy driver.
